# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Upgrades with AI Assist and Mobile Onboarding
- Summary: Highlight CodeGrind's latest DSA practice features, Azure OpenAI assistance, and revamped onboarding for mobile users, anchored by recent dev-focused updates.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-07-codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style problems with AI-powered guidance and a polished onboarding flow, plus an upgraded Tower Defense-inspired visualization of programming concepts. Real-time editor, model-switching AI, and streamlined sign-in improve practice efficiency and learning engagement.
- CTA: Try a guided problem now with AI assistance and share your progress with the CodeGrind community.
- Visual brief: A short 20-30s demo video showing the CodeGrind editor in action: a user selects a problem, the AI assistant suggests hints, code is written with real-time feedback, and an on-screen onboarding tip highlights Google sign-in and mobile-friendly UI. Include cyberpunk UI accents and subtle tower-defense visuals in the background to tie to CodeGrind’s branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
